chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP No.D–3444 of 2025 ________________________________________________ DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(s) OF JUDGE(s) ________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No.14588/2025 2. For order on office objection No.1 to 3 3. For order on Misc. No.14589/2025 4. For hearing of main case 21-07-2025 M/s. Asfandyar Jahangir & Koonj Wahid Bhutto, Advocates for Petitioner a/w Petitioner --------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. The grievance of the Petitioner is that though the FIR is registered against the Petitioner under old law, however, the trial Court is not entertaining the same on the ground that 2024 law is amended. We have verified the FIR, which reflects that no Section of any Amendment Act 2024 is applied; therefore, bar of Section 35 of the C.N.S. Act is not applicable at the present situation. Under such circumstances, we deem it appropriate to admit the Petitioner on protective bail for a period of five days from today, subject to her furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees Ten Thousand only) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court, to enable her to approach appropriate forum in accordance with law. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE FAIZAN/
